locations.context: Footer: 'Volvo Bus Corporation / SE-405 08 Göteborg / Sweden'
Footer: 'Volvo Bus Corporation / SE-405 08 Göteborg / Sweden'

rule_activation.lc_exception_details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-26D-465414' does not contain an LC banking term reference per rule 2.2.

consignor.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CORPORATION, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden (VAT No. SE556197382601)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Volvo Bus Corporation' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' found in issuer block (page 1) and in footer on pages 1 and 2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name after normalization.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Volvo Bus Corporation' → normalized: 'volvo bus corporation'. Invoice: 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' → normalized: 'volvo bus corporation'. EXACT MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignor country between certificate and invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' (in footer), also SE prefix in VAT number SE556197382601 confirms Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice issuer block and footer.
Name verification – exact match after case normalization.
Country verified via explicit address in footer and SE prefix in VAT number.

evidence.description: Invoice footer: 'Volvo Bus Corporation / SE-405 08 Göteborg / Sweden'
VAT number SE556197382601 with SE prefix confirms Sweden.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' in Sweden. Invoice issuer is 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' at 'SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden' with VAT No. SE556197382601. After case normalization both names are identical: 'volvo bus corporation'. Country is 'Sweden' in both documents, confirmed by explicit address and SE prefix in VAT number. Rule 4.1.0 confirms name found in issuer block. Rule 4.1.4 confirms country match. Result: MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Africa
consignee.invoice_value: Buyer: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Arica; Consignee: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Arica

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice. Invoice contains 'Buyer:' field with 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'. Invoice also contains 'Consignee:' field with same party.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field (Buyer) identified: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'. This is the authoritative consignee per rule 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer/consignee name after normalization.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' → normalized: 'volvo group southern africa pty ltd'. Invoice Buyer: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' → normalized: 'volvo group southern africa pty ltd'. EXACT MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee country. Certificate: 'South Africa'. Invoice Buyer address: 'South Arica' (probable OCR/typo for 'South Africa'). Invoice Consignee address: 'South Arica'.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice text reads 'South Arica' which is clearly a minor OCR/spelling error for 'South Africa' — a single missing letter 'f'. Given that the company name matches exactly and the address matches exactly, and no other country could be intended, this is treated as a minor spelling variation. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – Buyer field identified as primary billing field.
Name verification – exact match after case normalization.
Land verification – 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' treated as minor spelling variation (single missing character 'f').
Normalization allows minor spelling variations in country names.

evidence.description: Certificate consignee: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'
Invoice buyer: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'
Invoice consignee: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'
Invoice buyer country: 'South Arica' (probable typo for South Africa)

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' in South Africa. Invoice has both a 'Buyer' field and a 'Consignee' field, both showing the same party: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'. Name is an exact match after case normalization. Address matches: 'Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg'. Country: certificate says 'South Africa', invoice says 'South Arica' — the missing 'f' in 'Africa' is clearly a minor spelling error (one character difference), with company name and full address matching exactly. Per rule 4.5.4 (minor spelling variations in country names), this is accepted. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to 'South Arica' vs 'South Africa'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Single character difference ('f' missing) is a clear spelling/OCR error, not a different country. Company name and full address match exactly. Rule 4.5.4 allows minor spelling variations.

goods_description.certificate_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS, VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
goods_description.invoice_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS; VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324; Material: VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers. No explicit article numbers found in certificate (VIN is a vehicle identification number, not a product/article number).
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers to verify via Priority 1. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Priority 2: Controlled text matching - Main description
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS'. Compare with invoice description.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice Additional information section states: '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS'. After case normalization, the identity-bearing main designation 'volvo bus chassis model bere electric with 01 ess' can be identified exactly in the invoice. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate VIN: YV3U4W122TA226324. Invoice VIN No column: YV3U4W122TA226324.

Certificate includes '01' (quantity prefix) and VIN number. Invoice table material column shows 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' which appears truncated. The full description is in the Additional information section.
comparison_steps.result: The identity-bearing main designation is fully verifiable via the Additional information section. The truncated table entry does not create a contradiction. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority 2 controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation identified exactly in invoice.
VIN verification – identical VIN numbers in both documents.
Non-identity-bearing additions – quantity prefix '01' and formatting differences do not affect product identity.

evidence.description: Certificate goods: '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324'
Invoice goods description: '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS'

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS' with VIN YV3U4W122TA226324. Invoice Additional information section describes '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS'. After case normalization, the descriptions are identical. VIN numbers are identical in both documents (YV3U4W122TA226324). The invoice table's Material column shows 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' which appears truncated, but the full description is available in the Additional information section. Per rule 4.3.3, the identity-bearing main designation is exactly identifiable in the invoice. Per rule 4.3.3.0.1, VIN is identical. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to truncated material description 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' in table
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The full goods description is available in the Additional information section which matches exactly. The truncated table entry is additional information that does not contradict the main description.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 states '6100 kg'. Numeric value: 6100. Unit: kg. Both present.
comparison_steps.result: Valid quantity specification. Proceed to verification.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 contains '6100 kg'. Certificate Box 6 contains '01 UNIT'. Box 7 is the authoritative quantity field.
comparison_steps.result: Verification based on Box 7 value: 6100 kg.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '6100 kg' without explicit GW/NW category. This is a single weight value.
comparison_steps.result: Single weight value without GW/NW. Apply rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: if value can be identified in invoice and invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight value of another category → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 6100 in invoice weight/quantity fields.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice states 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. Numeric value 6100 found exactly. Unit KG matches kg. No other weight value in a different category is present in the invoice. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Quantity requirement – numeric value and unit both present in certificate.
Box 7 is the authoritative quantity field.
Single weight value without GW/NW – rule point 2 applies: value identified in invoice, no contradictory alternative.
Occurrence check – numeric value 6100 found exactly in invoice Total weight:[KG] field.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '6100 kg'. Invoice states 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. The numeric value 6100 is identical. The unit kg/KG is the same. Certificate does not specify GW or NW explicitly, and invoice also does not specify GW or NW — it simply states 'Total weight'. Since only one weight value exists in the certificate and only one in the invoice, and they match exactly, rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 applies: MATCH. No contradictory alternative weight value exists in the invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MANUAL_REVIEW due to missing GW/NW designation
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 covers this: single weight value without category, identifiable in invoice, no contradictory alternative weight → MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: SE; Origin declaration: 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community'

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice. Found: (1) 'Country of origin: SE' field on page 1. (2) Export declaration on page 1: 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community'.
comparison_steps.result: Two origin references found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice states 'SE' (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden). Normalize: Sweden = SE.
comparison_steps.result: Sweden and SE are the same country after ISO code normalization. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice also declares origin as 'European Community'. Sweden is an EU member state. This is consistent with the certificate's origin 'Sweden'.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction. Sweden is EU member. Both origin references in invoice are consistent with certificate origin 'Sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Identification – origin field 'Country of origin: SE' found in invoice.
EU member state – Sweden is EU member, consistent with invoice's 'European Community' declaration.

evidence.description: Invoice origin field: 'Country of origin: SE'
Invoice origin declaration: 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community'

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states origin 'Sweden'. Invoice has an explicit 'Country of origin: SE' field — SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden, so this is a direct match per rule 4.5.4. Additionally, the invoice's export declaration states origin is 'European Community', which is consistent since Sweden is an EU member (rule 4.5.4.2). Both origin references in the invoice are fully consistent with the certificate's stated origin of Sweden. Result: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE. No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-26D-465414' does not constitute an LC banking term reference.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin, EU/ICC format). Document B is invoice (2 pages). Single certificate, single invoice. No pairing ambiguity.

PASS. Criteria 2 met: Certificate consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' matches invoice issuer 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION'. Criteria 3 met: Certificate consignee 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' matches invoice buyer and consignee.
MATCH. 'Volvo Bus Corporation' found in invoice issuer block and footer.
MATCH. Exact match after case normalization.
Buyer field identified as primary. Contains 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'.
MATCH. Exact match after case normalization.
MATCH. 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' – minor spelling variation (single missing character).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Goods description – Priority 2 controlled text matching
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH. Identity-bearing main designation exactly identifiable in invoice.
MATCH. VIN YV3U4W122TA226324 identical in both documents.
MATCH. Numeric value 6100 found in invoice 'Total weight:[KG]'.
Point 2 applied: single weight value, identified in invoice, no contradictory alternative. MATCH.
Sweden is EU member. Consistent with invoice's 'European Community' declaration.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (Volvo Bus Corporation, Sverige), mottagare (Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Sydafrika), varubeskrivning (Volvo Bus Chassis Model BERE Electric med VIN-nummer), kvantitet (6100 kg) och ursprungsland (Sverige) är verifierade. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_notes: Invoice contains minor typo 'South Arica' instead of 'South Africa' in buyer and consignee address blocks — assessed as single-character spelling error, not affecting verification.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CORPORATION, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden (VAT No. SE556197382601)
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match after case normalization. Country verified via address and VAT prefix.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Volvo Bus Corporation' matchar exakt i certifikat och faktura efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Adressen avser Göteborg i båda dokumenten. Land 'Sweden' verifierat via explicit adress i fakturans sidfot och SE-prefix i VAT-nummer SE556197382601.

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Africa
sections.invoice_value: Buyer: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Arica
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match. Country match with minor spelling variation ('South Arica' = 'South Africa').
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' matchar exakt i certifikat och faktura. Adressen 'Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg' är identisk. Fakturan anger 'South Arica' istället för 'South Africa' — en uppenbar stavningsvariant med en saknad bokstav ('f'). Med exakt namnmatchning och identisk adress bedöms detta som en mindre stavningsvariation per regel 4.5.4.

sections.certificate_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS, VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
sections.invoice_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS; VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
sections.rule_applied: Priority 2 controlled text matching. Identity-bearing main designation exactly identifiable. VIN number identical.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans beskrivningsavsnitt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. VIN-nummer YV3U4W122TA226324 är identiskt i båda dokumenten. Fakturans tabellpost 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' framstår som avkortad men den fullständiga beskrivningen finns i fakturans 'Additional information'-avsnitt.

sections.rule_applied: Direct occurrence check. Single weight value without GW/NW, identified exactly in invoice.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 7 anger '6100 kg'. Fakturan anger 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. Det numeriska värdet 6100 och enheten KG/kg överensstämmer exakt. Certifikatet anger inte GW/NW, men det är en enda viktsangivelse och fakturan anger inte heller en motstridande alternativ viktkategori. Regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 tillämpas: MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: ISO alpha-2 code normalization. Sweden = SE. EU member state consistency confirmed.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'Sweden' i Box 3. Fakturan har ett explicit fält 'Country of origin: SE'. SE är ISO alpha-2-koden för Sverige, vilket ger en exakt matchning efter normalisering. Fakturans exportdeklaration anger även 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community', vilket är konsistent med att Sverige är EU-medlemsstat.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) verifieras som MATCH. Certifikat SEG-26D-465414 överensstämmer med faktura SEA9000395. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH → comparison_result = IDENTICAL. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. No blocking issues identified.
